hero.name: Ignacio Exequiel Meoniz
hero.role: Information Systems student and builder of personal software projects
hero.summary: I am currently studying for both a Bachelor's degree and a Systems Analyst degree in Information Systems at UADER. I am interested in software development, cross-platform applications, automation, useful tools, and AI as part of the development process.
hero.availability: Open to keep building and learning

about.title: Software development, technical support, and continuous learning
about.description: A practical profile in progress, focused on building useful tools and growing through real work.
body: I am currently studying Information Systems at UADER. I am especially interested in building software that solves concrete problems, with a focus on web development, cross-platform applications, automation, and AI-assisted development workflows.

Alongside my studies, I have worked on personal projects and provided independent IT technical support. That combination has helped me strengthen both my technical skills and my practical approach to problem solving.

technologies.title: Technologies I use
technologies.description: Organized by area to reflect my current experience clearly and honestly.

projects.title: Personal work built around real needs and practical ideas
projects.description: DoBre is the main project in the portfolio, while the others show additional areas of work and learning.

items.name: DoBre
items.description: An application built to help Mercado Libre sellers automatically calculate their listing price based on how much money they want to receive after commissions, shipping costs, taxes, and other charges.

items.name: Aquamarine
items.description: Inventory, sales, and repair management system built with C++, Qt, and SQLite.

items.name: OrganEyes
items.description: Windows application that automatically sorts files by extension and file type.

certificates.title: Certifications
certificates.description: Certifications and verifiable credentials will be added here in the future.

participations.title: Events and competitions
participations.description: Places where I have taken part by building and presenting projects.

items.name: OpenAI Build Week 2026
items.description: An international competition organized by OpenAI where I built and submitted DoBre, using AI tools as support during development. Project published on Devpost.

experience.title: Technical work and hands-on experience
experience.description: Real work experiences that complement my studies and personal projects.
